programs.title: American Pickers
programs.desc: In search of a rare race car for a client, the guys travel to Italy for what could be the biggest deal of their lives. But when their dolce vita dream goes bust, they hit the road and start picking.

programs.title: Pawn Stars
programs.desc: Feast your eyes on the most amazing and rare top dollar toys: a one-of-a-kind Hot Wheels, a vintage skateboard collection, and limited-edition Lionel train set.

programs.title: Outback Truckers
programs.desc: House mover Robbie MacKay is dragging a house up a mountain and long-haul drivers Mish Aladin and Dru Norman... hauling two massive mining tippers, are trapped by rising floodwaters.

programs.title: Cape Carnage: Killer Catch
programs.desc: The Wildcard battles sharks, a giant crocodile, chronic injury, arguments and persistent fog. All threatening to derail reaching their season target and hitting pay dirt.

programs.title: Outback Truckers
programs.desc: Car wreckers Mike and Bozza tackle the sand dunes of Northwest Australia for a big payday and long-haul truckers, Mish and Drew, go swimming as wet season flooding swamps Australia’s Top End.

programs.title: Railroad Australia
programs.desc: The sugar train is desperate to hit its deadline for the first cane harvest of the year. Plus, the Gemco team tackle a problematic N-Class locomotive to get it back in service.
